$comment: Client-bundle budgets, enforced by scripts/check-bundle-budget.mjs (--check) after `next build` in CI. Values are KB gzip and include the shared rootMainFiles baseline. Measured at v1.32.0 after the correctness/UX architecture wave: / 425, /insights 411, /measurements 412, /insights/mood 428, total 2982, baseline 129. Route caps retain focused headroom; the aggregate cap allows normal chunk noise while still catching a new ~90 KB duplicated library. Message catalogs and duplicate Recharts chunks have dedicated structural guards.
